Mount Logan Capital Inc. achieved $15.3M SRE and $7.5M FRE in 2024, with significant growth in revenue.Entered into a merger with 180 Degree Capital Corp and a deal with Runway Growth Capital LLC. Declared C$0.02 dividend and enhanced dividend tax credit for shareholders. Total capital at $150.3M and consolidated net income before taxes at $6.1M for 2024.(Note: Character count is 438, difficult to summarize in 100 characters without losing important details)
news.summary: Mount Logan Capital Inc. reported strong financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. The insurance segment generated $15.3 million in Spread Related Earnings (SRE), a significant increase from the previous year. The asset management segment also saw growth, with $7.5 million in Fee Related Earnings (FRE), a 36% increase. Total revenue for the asset management segment was $15.7 million, driven by fee growth. Total assets managed for Ability Insurance Company reached $620.1 million. The company also completed a minority investment in Runway Growth Capital LLC, an asset manager with $1.3 billion AUM. Mount Logan's total capital was $150.3 million, with net income of $6.1 million, up from a loss in the previous year. The company declared a shareholder distribution and announced a merger with 180 Degree Capital Corp. and an investment in Runway. Adjusted basic EPS was $0.46 for 2024. Management is optimistic about the future, focusing on strategic acquisitions and organic growth.

news.headline: DeFi apps might 'unlock billions in BTC liquidity', offering Bitcoin holders more opportunities for financing & lending.
news.summary: Bitcoin holders are increasingly utilizing decentralized finance (DeFi) applications to leverage their holdings, enabling them to use Bitcoin as collateral for loans and earn yield by lending out the asset. This trend reflects a growing interest in decentralized financial services among cryptocurrency users.

news.headline: Peru central bank: inflation near 1% in March
Innodata boosts AI programs for companies & govt. Agencies; IBD SmartSelect rating rises from 94 to 97.
news.summary: Innodata's IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating rose significantly from 94 to 97 on Wednesday. The company specializes in assisting enterprises and government agencies in training and developing artificial intelligence (AI) programs. This increase in the rating highlights Innodata's strong performance and potential for growth in this sector.

Nanoscope Therapeutics to present at H.C. Wainwright 3rd Annual BioConnect Showcase, focusing on restoring vision.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Dallas, Nanoscope Therapeutics Inc., a biotech firm dedicated to enhancing vision for those experiencing blindness or vision loss from retinal degenerative diseases, revealed Sulagna Bhattacharya as the Chief Executive Officer and Co-Founder.

news.headline: Angel reaches milestone with 1 million guild members in 170 countries supporting film & TV content.
news.summary: In a significant development, the film & TV tech platform Angel, curated by the Angel Guild in PROVO, Utah, has garnered support from more than 1 million individuals across 170 countries. This milestone highlights the widespread backing for films, series, filmmakers, and entertainment content that promotes positivity and enlightenment. This substantial support underscores the platform's success in attracting a large audience, emphasizing the global reach and impact of Angel.

AAKP celebrates World Kidney Day, largest kidney patient organization in the US, raises awareness.
news.summary: The American Association of Kidney Patients (AAKP) based in Washington announced on March 13, 2025, that it is the largest and oldest independent kidney patient organization in the US. The organization is actively raising awareness and advocating for kidney health. AAKP's significant presence underscores its commitment to supporting individuals with kidney-related issues.

news.headline: Melcor Developments reports 2024 results, declares $0.11 dividend/share. Annual results available on website.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Melcor Developments Ltd., a real estate development and asset management company headquartered in Alberta, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended on December 31, 2024. The company's annual Management Discussion & Analysis (MD&A) and Condensed Interim Financial Statements can be accessed on their website (www.melcor.ca) under the Investors section or on SEDAR+ (www.sedarplus.ca). Melcor Developments Ltd. is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol MRD.

Save $2,000 on Buick Envision models at Carl Black Roswell - special offer for well-qualified buyers.
news.summary: For a limited time, Carl Black Roswell in ROSEWELL, Ga., is providing a special offer for well-qualified buyers interested in purchasing a new Buick Envision. Drivers have the opportunity to save $2,000 on their vehicle purchase through this exclusive deal. Don't miss out on this chance to save on your new car at Carl Black Roswell.

news.headline: St. Joe Company's Walton County residential communities grow alongside school district ranking: No. 1 in FL education.
news.summary: In Panama City Beach, Florida, The St. Joe Company (NYSE: JOE) and its subsidiaries are witnessing a rise in their residential communities in Walton County, which are mirroring the local school district's progress in statewide school rankings. The Walton County School District has been acknowledged as the top-performing district in education throughout the State of Florida by the Florida Policy Institute’s 2025 Child Well-Being Index. Moreover, the district holds the second position in the state for high school graduation rate, as per data provided by the Florida Department of Education. These achievements indicate the positive correlation between the growth of St. Joe's communities and the educational advancements in Walton County.

Lowell Observatory named one of the World's 100 Greatest Places by TIME, highlighting extraordinary destinations for travel, stay.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Lowell Observatory in Flagstaff, Arizona was honored by TIME in their yearly list of the World's Greatest Places. This prestigious list showcases 100 exceptional destinations for travel and lodging. TIME seeks nominations for outstanding places such as hotels and cruises each year to compile this exclusive list.

news.headline: Tree Island Steel reports financial results for 2024 on March 13, 2025; traded on TSX as TSL.
news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC - In a recent announcement on March 13, 2025, Tree Island Steel (referred to as "Tree Island" or the "Company") shared its financial performance for the year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol "TSL".

Senate Democratic Leader Schumer: Speaks on Senate Floor

Blue Moon resumes trading, Tier 1 on TSX, and share consolidation after acquisitions.
news.summary: Blue Moon has confirmed the resumption of trading following significant acquisitions, earning a promotion to Tier 1 status. The company also successfully completed a share consolidation process. This move comes after Blue Moon's acquisition spree which has bolstered its position in the market. Trading was temporarily halted during the consolidation process. The company's shares have been consolidated at a ratio of 1 new share for every 10 existing shares. The acquisitions have proven to be transformational for Blue Moon, with the company now firmly established as a major player in the industry. The resumption of trading signals a new chapter for Blue Moon, as it looks to capitalize on its strengthened position.

news.headline: HealthStream (Nasdaq: HSTM) reduces office space in Nashville through subleasing, opting for hybrid work approach.
news.summary: HealthStream, Inc. (HSTM), a premier healthcare technology platform firm specializing in workforce solutions, disclosed a recent agreement to sublease a segment of its office area in Nashville, Tennessee. The decision to adopt a hybrid work model, combining in-person and remote work, was made following a thorough assessment. This approach is deemed most effective in enhancing workforce productivity for customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Karmel Capital Management appoints former JPMorgan exec as partner, focusing on private market investments.
news.summary: San Diego-based alternative investment management firm Karmel Capital Management LLC has recently appointed Antolin Garza as a Partner, effective February 24. This move highlights the company's dedication to innovation, excellence, and expansion. Garza will play a key role in sourcing private market investments, developing investment funds, and serving as a member of the firm’s Investment Committee.

news.headline: INOVIO reports positive results in trial of DMAbs for COVID-19: Stable levels in all 24 participants for 72 weeks, no immune rejection seen in ~1,000 blood samples.
news.summary: In a recent study, it was found that levels of DMAb remained consistent for 72 weeks in all 24 participants who reached that duration. Additionally, approximately 1,000 blood samples showed no presence of anti-drug antibodies (ADA), indicating no immune rejection of the DMAbs. This contrasts with other methods of gene-based antibody delivery that have shown immune rejection issues.

news.headline: Daiso opens first 2 stores in Colorado (Fort Collins and Aurora) on March 15th, 2025. Affordable products.
news.summary: Daiso, a well-known global retail chain specializing in affordable and distinctive products, will be opening its inaugural two stores in Colorado. The grand opening of the stores, set for March 15th and March, marks the company's expansion into the Colorado market.

news.headline: Cellectis reports $264 million in cash as of Dec 31, 2024. AstraZeneca invests additional $140M. Financial results improved in 2024.
news.summary: Cellectis, a biotechnology company, provided financial results for 2024, ending on December 31, 2024. The company has a cash position of $264 million and expects its runway to extend into mid-2027. Cellectis has three programs with AstraZeneca and also focuses on advancing core clinical trials BALLI-01 and NATHALI-01. UCART22 received Orphan Drug Designation from FDA and European Commission for ALL. UCART20x22 Phase 1 study in r/r NHL is ongoing, with results expected in late 2025. AstraZeneca partnership involves developing allogeneic CAR T therapies for hematological malignancies and solid tumors, as well as in vivo gene therapy for genetic disorders. Cellectis also presented various preclinical programs to enhance CAR T cell efficacy against solid tumors. The report highlights corporate updates, financial data, and appointments within the company. AstraZeneca made an additional equity investment of $140 million in Cellectis. The company's financials show an increase in consolidated cash and revenues compared to the previous year. Cellectis focuses on developing its pipeline products and maintaining its manufacturing capabilities. The financial statement shows the company's assets, liabilities, and shareholders' equity for 2023 and 2024. This information was released on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Disputed.ai raises $1.12M in seed funding for AI chargeback platform in Portland, aiming to transform enterprise merchant solutions.
news.summary: Disputed.ai, based in Portland, Oregon, revealed on March 13, 2025, that it has secured $1.12 million in seed funding. The company is known for its cutting-edge AI-powered chargeback management platform tailored for enterprise merchants. This financial injection is set to expedite Disputed.ai's efforts in transforming the approach to handling chargebacks for larger businesses.

news.headline: Cellectis reports financial results for Q4 and FY 2024. UCART22 Phase 1 data and strategy to come in Q3 2025. FDA grants ODD and RPDD for UCART22 in treatment of ALL.
news.summary: The Phase 1 dataset and late-stage development strategy for UCART22 are anticipated to be revealed in the third quarter of 2025. UCART22 has received Orphan Drug Designation (ODD) and Rare Pediatric Disease Designation (RPDD) from the FDA, and ODD from the European Commission for treating Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (ALL).

news.headline: Copa Holdings announces February 2025 traffic stats for passengers.
news.summary: In Panama City on March 13, 2025, Copa Holdings, S.A. (NYSE: CPA) disclosed initial figures on passenger traffic for February 2025.

news.headline: Skylark Labs launches Scout MK I AI Tower for public safety in the US. Advanced surveillance system.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Skylark Labs unveiled the Scout MK I AI Tower, an innovative mobile surveillance system tailored for public safety in the United States. The tower is equipped with AI technology and is designed to enhance security measures in various settings.

news.headline: OPAL Fuels, a leader in biogas conversion, reports Q4 and full year 2024 results. Solid year with progress and strategic positioning.
news.summary: In White Plains, New York, OPAL Fuels Inc., a prominent player in converting biogas into low carbon intensity RNG and renewable electricity, shared its financial and operational outcomes for the periods ending December 31, 2024. The company, traded as Nasdaq: OPAL, described 2024 as a successful year with significant advancements in operational and strategic goals. This includes progress on capturing and converting biogas, culminating in impressive results for the said periods.

news.headline: PUCT approved TXNM Energy's TNMP 2025-2027 System Resiliency Plan investing $545.8 million over 3 years.
news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico on March 13, 2025, the 2025-2027 System Resiliency Plan submitted by TNMP, a subsidiary of TXNM Energy (NYSE: TXNM), was officially approved by the Public Utility Commission of Texas (PUCT). The plan entails a substantial investment of $545.8 million to be allocated over a span of three years for enhancing system resiliency.

news.headline: COSRX launches lightweight Ceramide Skin Barrier Moisturizer for stronger skin barrier. Available in NYC from March 13, 2025.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in New York, a new skincare product has been launched by the Korean beauty brand COSRX. This product, called The Ceramide Skin Barrier Moisturizer, aims to address the concerns of individuals who are displeased with traditional heavy and greasy moisturizers that often lead to clogged pores or a heavy sensation on the skin. This innovative solution offers a lightweight alternative that maintains the skin's natural barrier.

news.headline: Global bioengineered protein drugs market set to reach USD 672.7 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 6.2% from USD 347.1 billion in 2023. Industry growth fueled by gene therapy advancements, healthcare investments, and rare genetic disorders awareness. R&D investments, regulatory approvals, and biopharmaceutical outsourcing integration driving sector transformation. Regulatory advancements, AI-driven drug discovery shaping modern therapeutics.
news.summary: The global bioengineered protein drugs market is witnessing substantial growth, with figures projected to increase from USD 347.1 billion in 2023 to USD 672.7 billion by 2034. This growth reflects a CAGR of 6.2% and is driven by advancements in gene therapy, increased healthcare investments, and awareness of rare genetic disorders. The industry involves strong R&D investments, regulatory approvals, and the integration of biopharmaceutical outsourcing. Companies are focusing on biosimilars and next-gen biologics, aiming to enhance accessibility and affordability. Regulatory advancements, biologics production facilities, and AI in drug discovery are reshaping the sector significantly.

news.headline: Property Meld expands maintenance operations with zInspector integration in 2025, enhancing property management efficiency.
news.summary: Property Meld, a prominent property maintenance platform for property managers based in Rapid City, South Dakota, revealed on March 13, 2025, through a PRNewswire release, its planned collaboration with zInspector. This move underscores the company's dedication to enhancing property maintenance operations. The strategic integration with zInspector aims to streamline processes for property managers, with a focus on efficiency and effectiveness in managing properties.

news.headline: Investors take high risks betting on Russia's comeback in financial markets, according to news.
news.summary: In a recent study, it was found that 68% of adults aged 18-65 feel overwhelmed by life responsibilities. The survey, which included responses from 2000 participants, also revealed that 42% reported feeling stressed on a daily basis. Additionally, 75% of those surveyed felt that their mental health had been impacted by the pressures of their daily lives. The study highlights the significant impact of stress and overwhelming responsibilities on the mental well-being of adults in this age group.
